tools.name: index_project
tools.title: Index Project
tools.description: Scan and index a project into the graph kernel, honoring Git excludes by default and including precise/framework overlays when available.

tools.name: install_graph_providers
tools.title: Install Graph Providers
tools.description: Detect graph-specific providers and optional SCIP exporters for the current project, then return exact remediation steps or install them on demand. This never installs runtimes or project dependencies.

path.description: Project root used for language detection and provider planning

mode.description: `check` reports the plan and remediation steps only. `install` runs the provider install commands when they are available for the current platform.

include_optional_scip.description: Include optional SCIP exporter checks alongside precise providers.

tools.name: export_scip
tools.title: Export SCIP
tools.description: Export indexed symbol facts to a binary SCIP artifact. TypeScript/JavaScript uses the native compiler lane; Python, PHP, and C# use their upstream SCIP indexers.

output_path.description: Destination `.scip` path. Relative paths resolve from the project root.

language.description: SCIP export backend. `typescript` uses the native compiler lane; `python`, `php`, and `csharp` orchestrate official SCIP indexers.

include_external_symbols.description: Include lightweight metadata for declaration-file symbols when available.

project_name.description: Python only: explicit SCIP project name. Defaults to pyproject/setup metadata or the project folder name.

project_namespace.description: Python only: optional namespace prefix for generated symbols.

target_only.description: Python only: optional subdirectory to index instead of the full project.

environment_path.description: Python only: optional path to a scip-python environment JSON file.

working_directory.description: C# only: optional working directory passed through to scip-dotnet.

tools.name: import_scip_overlay
tools.title: Import SCIP Overlay
tools.description: Import a binary SCIP artifact into provenance-tagged overlay facts without replacing the native graph. The import lane is derived from the artifact documents.

artifact_path.description: Path to a `.scip` artifact. Relative paths resolve from the project root.

replace_existing.description: Clear prior `scip_import` overlay edges before importing this artifact.

tools.name: find_symbols
tools.title: Find Symbols
tools.description: Find candidate symbols by name or partial name before selecting a canonical identity for deeper graph analysis.

limit.description: Max detailed candidate symbols to return (default: 8)

path.description: Indexed project root or a file/directory inside the indexed project

tools.name: inspect_symbol
tools.title: Inspect Symbol
tools.description: Return a symbol-centric briefing: canonical resolution, local context, incoming and outgoing relations, reference summary, and implementation summary.

name.description: Symbol name (must be paired with file)

file.description: File path used with name to disambiguate symbol

min_confidence.description: Filter out facts below this confidence tier

verbosity.description: Response budget. `minimal` returns the shortest actionable answer, `compact` keeps key reasoning visible, and `full` includes supporting detail.

expand.description: Optional bounded expansion sections to materialize. Heavy tools return counts/previews by default and expand only the requested sections.

expand_limit.description: Max rows to materialize for expanded sections (default: 10, capped at 25)

include_evidence.description: Include supporting evidence in expanded rows. Defaults to false to keep payloads compact.

path.description: Indexed project root or a file/directory inside the indexed project

tools.name: trace_paths
tools.title: Trace Paths
tools.description: Trace graph paths from a canonical symbol through calls, references, imports, type, flow, or mixed edges. Mixed traces can include framework overlay hops.

name.description: Symbol name (must be paired with file)

file.description: File path used with name to disambiguate symbol

to_name.description: Optional target symbol name (must be paired with to_file)

to_file.description: Optional target file used with to_name

path_kind.description: Traversal edge set. `mixed` includes framework overlay hops when present.

min_confidence.description: Filter out facts below this confidence tier

verbosity.description: Response budget. `minimal` returns the shortest actionable answer, `compact` keeps key reasoning visible, and `full` includes supporting detail.

expand.description: Optional bounded expansion sections to materialize. Heavy tools return counts/previews by default and expand only the requested sections.

expand_limit.description: Max rows to materialize for expanded sections (default: 10, capped at 25)

include_evidence.description: Include supporting evidence in expanded rows. Defaults to false to keep payloads compact.

path.description: Indexed project root or a file/directory inside the indexed project

tools.name: find_references
tools.title: Find References
tools.description: Find semantic usages of a canonical symbol identity, including framework overlay wiring when present.

name.description: Symbol name (must be paired with file)

file.description: File path used with name to disambiguate symbol

kind.description: Optional edge-kind filter. Includes semantic and framework kinds such as `route_to_handler`, `injects`, `registers`, `renders`, and `middleware_for`.

min_confidence.description: Filter out facts below this confidence tier

verbosity.description: Response budget. `minimal` returns the shortest actionable answer, `compact` keeps key reasoning visible, and `full` includes supporting detail.

expand.description: Optional bounded expansion sections to materialize. Heavy tools return counts/previews by default and expand only the requested sections.

expand_limit.description: Max rows to materialize for expanded sections (default: 10, capped at 25)

include_evidence.description: Include supporting evidence in expanded rows. Defaults to false to keep payloads compact.

path.description: Indexed project root or a file/directory inside the indexed project

tools.name: find_implementations
tools.title: Find Implementations
tools.description: Find implementations and overrides for a canonical symbol identity.

name.description: Symbol name (must be paired with file)

file.description: File path used with name to disambiguate symbol

verbosity.description: Response budget. `minimal` returns the shortest actionable answer, `compact` keeps key reasoning visible, and `full` includes supporting detail.

expand.description: Optional bounded expansion sections to materialize. Heavy tools return counts/previews by default and expand only the requested sections.

expand_limit.description: Max rows to materialize for expanded sections (default: 10, capped at 25)

include_evidence.description: Include supporting evidence in expanded rows. Defaults to false to keep payloads compact.

path.description: Indexed project root or a file/directory inside the indexed project

tools.name: trace_dataflow
tools.title: Trace Dataflow
tools.description: Find deterministic source-to-sink dataflow paths between anchored flow points.

name.description: Symbol name (must be paired with file)

file.description: File path used with name to disambiguate symbol

symbol.description: Canonical selector for the symbol that owns this flow point

access_path.description: Bounded property path segments for property anchors

name.description: Symbol name (must be paired with file)

file.description: File path used with name to disambiguate symbol

symbol.description: Canonical selector for the symbol that owns this flow point

access_path.description: Bounded property path segments for property anchors

min_confidence.description: Filter out facts below this confidence tier

verbosity.description: Response budget. `minimal` returns the shortest actionable answer, `compact` keeps key reasoning visible, and `full` includes supporting detail.

expand.description: Optional bounded expansion sections to materialize. Heavy tools return counts/previews by default and expand only the requested sections.

expand_limit.description: Max rows to materialize for expanded sections (default: 10, capped at 25)

include_evidence.description: Include supporting evidence in expanded rows. Defaults to false to keep payloads compact.

path.description: Indexed project root or a file/directory inside the indexed project

tools.name: analyze_changes
tools.title: Analyze Changes
tools.description: Review a git diff, commit range, or worktree change set and return a compact semantic risk snapshot with changed symbols, deleted API warnings, and optional supporting paths.

base_ref.description: Git baseline ref used to compute the changed-symbol set

head_ref.description: Optional git head ref. If omitted, the current checkout/worktree is compared to `base_ref`.

include_paths.description: Include reverse mixed graph paths for the returned symbols. Default is false to keep the snapshot compact.

max_symbols.description: Maximum changed symbols to return after risk ranking (default: 10)

max_paths.description: Maximum supporting paths per symbol when `include_paths` is true (default: 3)

tools.name: analyze_edit_region
tools.title: Analyze Edit Region
tools.description: Inspect the semantic impact of editing a concrete file range: edited symbols, external callers, downstream flow, framework wiring, and duplicate/code-clone risk.

file.description: File path inside the indexed project. Absolute paths are accepted when they stay inside the project root.

line_start.description: 1-based starting line of the edited region

line_end.description: 1-based ending line of the edited region

verbosity.description: Response budget. `minimal` returns the shortest actionable answer, `compact` keeps key reasoning visible, and `full` includes supporting detail.

tools.name: analyze_architecture
tools.title: Analyze Architecture
tools.description: Return a high-level architecture view with modules, dependency boundaries, cycles, coupling, framework surfaces, and top risks.

limit.description: Max module, cycle, coupling, and hotspot rows to surface (default: 5)

verbosity.description: Response budget. `minimal` returns the shortest actionable answer, `compact` keeps key reasoning visible, and `full` includes supporting detail.

tools.name: audit_workspace
tools.title: Audit Workspace
tools.description: Audit the indexed workspace for cleanup and maintainability issues: unused exports, hotspots, and clone groups with a single review-oriented result.

verbosity.description: Response budget. `minimal` returns the shortest actionable answer, `compact` keeps key reasoning visible, and `full` includes supporting detail.

limit.description: Max unused, hotspot, and clone group rows to surface (default: 5, capped at 25)

clone_member_limit.description: Max clone members per group to surface (default: 3, or 10 with verbosity=full, capped at 25)

show_suppressed.description: Include suppressed unused exports in the visible result
